# cron job to run at 1:11 AM

  schedule:
    - cron: '11 1 * * *'

# method 2 - for one repo, not repo to repo, pack and deploy is boilerplate

- name: Pack for github pages, one repo only
  uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v4
  with:
    path: _dist

- name: Deploy for github pages, one repo only
  uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4


# commits and pushes from the runner to the current repository


- name: Commit and push to current repository
  uses: stefanzweifel/git-auto-commit-action@v7
  permissions:
    contents: write
  with:
    commit_message: 'automated script [skip ci]'
    file_pattern: '_dist/*'


# chain a work flow requires ...
  permissions:
    actions: write
- name: Trigger Build Workflow
  run: gh workflow run webpack.yml
  env:
    GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}


# previously used in download_json script

      # peace iris - highly efficient
      - name: Deploy to Remote Repo
        uses: peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v4
        with:
          # created and named in the GUI
          personal_token: ${{ secrets.API_TOKEN_GITHUB }}
          # the source
          publish_dir: ./_public-vite
          # the destination
          external_repository: caaker/caaker.github.io
          publish_branch: main
















# method 1 - pushes everything in _dist to caaker.github.io, deprecated
- name: Push to caaker.github.io
  uses: cpina/github-action-push-to-another-repository@main
  env:
    API_TOKEN_GITHUB: ${{ secrets.API_TOKEN_GITHUB }}
  with:
    source-directory: '_dist'
    destination-github-username: 'caaker'
    destination-repository-name: 'caaker.github.io'
    target-branch: 'main'
